query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "enhancing train-free infinite-frame generation for consistent long vid" computer science
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's research question by proposing a specific method (Ouroboros-Diffusion) to solve the exact problem of "consistent long video generation" in a "tuning-free" (train-free) setting, which is the core subject of the user's follow-up inquiry. It satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it provides the canonical alternative approach and empirical evidence for the same mechanism (FIFO-based diffusion with consistency enhancements) that the user is investigating.
